channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Wednesday, February 18
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 03:00 AM (1.615 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 10:24 AM (-0.238 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: S 14 mph
